summary: Exceptional audience tap that outshines the board, though performance details are scarce.
review: Both reviewers lavish praise on this tape, calling it “the goods” and “magnificent,” noting that it sounds better than a typical soundboard source. No specific comments about the musical performance or setlist were provided, so the analysis focuses on the outstanding recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong, unanimous praise for the recording quality (excellent) but no information on the musical performance; overall rating reflects a high‑quality source with limited show data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best source, better than the board; clear, immersive ambience and superb tape fidelity.
